---
description: "Use this prompt to generate a new assignment README following the project template."
---

# New Assignment Prompt

Provide the following details to create an assignment README:

- **Title**: A short, descriptive name for the assignment.
- **Objective**: One or two sentences summarizing what students will learn or build.
- **Tasks**: List of tasks; for each task include:
  - Task title
  - Description of what needs to be done
  - Requirements (bullet points)

The output should be the full contents of a markdown file that matches `templates/assignment-template.md` with the provided information filled in. Do not include additional sections or commentary.
